title: Implement modularshoot:states registry API (Java registration + data pack JSON loading)

reference_files.reason: State registration - Java API + data pack dual registration, hot reload support, registry fields
API overview - DataPackRegistry mechanism for modularshoot:states
Data pack registration - JSON file paths and loading mechanism
modularshoot:ammo_damage_type convention - framework reads this state at shoot time, does not pre-register it

acceptance_criteria: StateRegistry class provides Java API: register(ResourceLocation id, StateDefinition definition) writing to modularshoot:states dynamic registry
Data pack JSON loading works from data/<namespace>/modularshoot/states/<state_id>.json path
Registry content is hot-reloadable via /reload command
StateRegistry.get(ResourceLocation id) returns Holder<StateDefinition> or null for unregistered IDs
StateRegistry.getAll() returns stream of all registered state entries
M1 StateDefinition stub in ModularShootRegistries.java replaced with full M5 StateDefinition Codec
Framework pre-registers 0 states (all states registered by upper mods); modularshoot:ammo_damage_type is a convention only, not pre-registered
deliverables: src/main/java/org/yanbwe/modularshoot/registry/ModularShootRegistries.java (updated: replace StateDefinition stub with full Codec)
